positive: A cyberpunk cityscape viewed through a rainy window. Neon signs reflecting on wet pavement, towering futuristic skyscrapers, deep blues, magenta, and cyan glow. Synthwave atmosphere, highly detailed, cinematic illustration, Blade Runner aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, soft lighting, rural elements, watercolor, pastel colors
